title: Respawn Pointer
description: Easy Respawn Point! Right click to set a respawn point, No Beds Needed Anymore
body:
**Respawn pointer ensure that your respawn point is easily placed without needing a bed!** 

**How to use? 
Place the tool in your left or right hand and click with your right mouse button to place your respawn point. and, done!**

![Respawn](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aed53ed58f56f7a16aad039e13168b336b73c6c6_0.webp)

**Can be used underground and above the ground.
Can be used in the nether / end. ( and modded dimension's )
Respawn Pointer have ulimated use.
The respawn Pointer can not be destroyed by lava.**

**Neo(Forge) Only.**


Crafting:

![crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0010a7cfc462a26be8fc8e909c5717d8f2a6ef56.png)

![intelij](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/343a4cdc7be7fa26dfd02e5d47dfbffa99016f2f.png)

**This mod is created with: intellij**
